caption: A man with a beard, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold, and a gold watch, is speaking into a professional studio microphone. He is seated in a studio setting with a white backdrop featuring "UNIQUE HUSTLE" logos and a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black mug with "THE TALK OUT" text is visible on the table. Throughout the sequence, the man is actively engaged in conversation, using hand gestures to emphasize his points. He starts by looking toward someone off-camera, then raises his right hand while speaking, and later opens both hands in a gesturing motion. A small logo for "THE TALK OUT" appears in the bottom-left corner of each scene. The camera angle remains a medium close-up, focusing on the man as he speaks and moves his hands.
